title: Switch universe source to Binance USDT-M Futures

requirements.summary: Replace universe endpoint base URL from Spot API to Futures API in safeFetch configuration
acceptanceCriteria: safeFetch utility uses https://fapi.binance.com as base URL
All universe-related fetches target Futures API endpoints

file_operations.description: Update base URL configuration from https://api.binance.com to https://fapi.binance.com for Futures API access. Modify the URL construction logic to use the new Futures base URL when making universe-related requests.

requirements.summary: Update fetchUniverse24h to call Futures ticker endpoint instead of Spot endpoint
acceptanceCriteria: fetchUniverse24h calls /fapi/v1/ticker/24hr endpoint
Function returns array of Futures ticker data or empty array on failure

file_operations.description: Replace the endpoint in fetchUniverse24h from /api/v3/ticker/24hr to /fapi/v1/ticker/24hr to fetch USDT-M Futures perpetual contract data. Ensure the function continues to return an array of ticker objects or empty array on failure, maintaining the same error handling pattern.

requirements.summary: Modify universe filtering to include only USDT-ending symbols and explicitly exclude all USDC-containing symbols
acceptanceCriteria: Filter rejects any symbol not ending with 'USDT'
Filter rejects any symbol containing 'USDC' anywhere in the string (case-insensitive)
USDC exclusion check runs before volume threshold filtering

file_operations.description: Add filtering logic to ensure symbols end with 'USDT' and do not contain 'USDC' anywhere in the string (case-insensitive check). Apply these filters early in the processing pipeline, before the existing volume threshold filter. Reject symbols that fail either condition.

requirements.summary: Add stable-to-stable pair exclusion by checking base asset against stablecoin identifiers
acceptanceCriteria: Extract base asset by removing 'USDT' suffix
Reject symbol if base asset matches any stablecoin identifier (case-insensitive)
Stable-to-stable exclusion runs after USDT/USDC filtering but before volume threshold

file_operations.description: Add validation to extract base asset (symbol without 'USDT' suffix) and check if it matches any stablecoin identifier: USDC, BUSD, TUSD, FDUSD, USDP, DAI, UST, PAX, USD1 (case-insensitive comparison). Reject symbols where base asset is a stablecoin. Place this check after USDT/USDC filtering but before volume threshold filtering.

requirements.summary: Update volume parsing to use Number() conversion and apply threshold after numeric conversion
acceptanceCriteria: Parse quoteVolume with Number() before comparison
Volume threshold check (>= 5,000,000) happens after numeric conversion
NaN values from parsing are logged but not excluded from processing

file_operations.description: Replace existing quoteVolume parsing logic with Number(item.quoteVolume) conversion. Apply the volume threshold filter (>= 5,000,000) after numeric conversion is complete. Add logging for NaN values encountered during parsing, but do not exclude them from further processing.

requirements.summary: Add UNIVERSE_SOURCE log event when fetchUniverse24h is called
acceptanceCriteria: UNIVERSE_SOURCE event logged at start of universe fetch
Payload includes source='FUTURES_USDTM' and endpoint path
Event appears in logs before UNIVERSE_FILTERED or UNIVERSE_DEBUG_SAMPLE

file_operations.description: Add a log event immediately at the start of fetchUniverse24h function (before any API call) with event type UNIVERSE_SOURCE and payload containing { source: 'FUTURES_USDTM', endpoint: '/fapi/v1/ticker/24hr' }. Use engineStore.getState().addLog() to record the event.

requirements.summary: Update fallback logic to apply USDT-only, no-USDC, no-stable/stable filters and return top 5 symbols
acceptanceCriteria: Fallback filters raw universe to USDT-ending symbols only
Fallback excludes all USDC-containing symbols
Fallback excludes stable-to-stable pairs (base asset check)
Fallback sorts remaining by quoteVolume DESC and returns exactly 5 symbols
UNIVERSE_FALLBACK event logged when fallback executes

file_operations.description: Update the fallback logic (when filtered.length === 0) to apply the same USDT-only filter, USDC exclusion, and stable-to-stable pair exclusion checks. Sort the resulting symbols by quoteVolume in descending order and return exactly the top 5 symbols (not 20). Ensure UNIVERSE_FALLBACK event is logged when this fallback path executes.

requirements.summary: Add UNIVERSE_SOURCE to LogEntry type union
acceptanceCriteria: UNIVERSE_SOURCE added to LogEntry type union
Type definition follows existing log structure with timestamp and payload fields

file_operations.description: Add UNIVERSE_SOURCE to the LogEntry type union. Ensure it includes the standard log structure with timestamp and payload fields, following the pattern of existing log event types.

requirements.summary: Display UNIVERSE_SOURCE log event in logs panel with default color coding
acceptanceCriteria: UNIVERSE_SOURCE events render in logs panel
Event uses default color (not error red or warning yellow)
Payload displays source and endpoint information

file_operations.description: Add rendering logic for UNIVERSE_SOURCE log event type. Use default color coding (not red or yellow) for this event type. Ensure the payload containing source and endpoint information is displayed in the log entry.
